subtitle: Please enter your credentials
selectPlatformDesc: Select the management platform you want to enter
featureMultiPlatformDesc: Single sign-on with seamless platform switching, each with independent dashboards and tenant backends
featurePermissionDesc: Platform, tenant, and role-based permission isolation with user, role, and menu management
featureThemeDesc: Dark mode, multiple layouts, theme colors, and trilingual support for a branded experience
